title: Discussing Banking Recapitalization & Economic Development With Auwalu Alhaji Kibiya. - FinancialEDGE
description: The Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) organized the 36th edition of Finance Correspondents Association of Nigeria (FICAN) and Business Editors seminar in Abuja. The event's theme was "Playing the Global Game, Banking Recapitalization, Towards a One Trillion Dollar Economy." The seminar provided a platform for industry experts, policymakers, and media professionals to discuss the role
html: The Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) organized  the 36th edition of Finance Correspondents Association of Nigeria (FICAN) and Business Editors seminar in Abuja.
